title: coordinator/mod.rs: rewrite doc_lazy_continuation justifying comment + actually fix the inherited docs
description:
Filed from architect audit of #547. Subagent added `#![allow(clippy::doc_lazy_continuation)]` at `src/coordinator/mod.rs:21` with a justifying comment that contains forbidden phrasing ("out of scope for #547"). Two follow-ups:

1. Rewrite the comment to drop scope-narrowing language. The lint comment template per rust-fix-discipline is "lint is wrong here because X", not "fixing is out of scope."
2. Actually fix the underlying lint by re-flowing the inherited Phase 1 doc bullets so the continuation lines indent correctly, then remove the module-level allow.

Low priority — the allow is doing the right thing (Category C, pre-existing lint not caused by #547's tests). This is comment + cleanup hygiene.
